title: sorbus × floribunda var. glabrescens
intro: Sorbus × floribunda var. glabrescens, also known as Mountain Ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a hybrid of the European Rowan (Sorbus aucuparia) and the Japanese Rowan (Sorbus commixta). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Sorbus × floribunda var. glabrescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
